hadiths.chapter: 91. Punishment of making something with an intention to boast about it
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ یَعْقُوبَ بْنِ یَزِیدَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِیمَ النَّوْفَلِیِّ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ الْمُخْتَارِ رَفَعَهُ إِلَی أَمِیرِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ ع قَالَ: مَنْ صَنَعَ شَیْئاً لِلْمُفَاخَرَهِ حَشَرَهُ اللَّهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ أَسْوَدَ الْوَجْهِ.
hadiths.en: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ya’qub b. Yazid from Muhammad b. Ibrahim al-Nawfali from al-Hussain b. al-Mukhtar who raised it to Ameer al-Mumineen (a.s.) who said: “One who makes something to boast about it will be raised on Qiyamat black-faced.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 91, H. 1001
reference.chapter: Punishment of making something with an intention to boast about it
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of making something with an intention to boast about it
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٩١، ح ١٠٠١

hadiths.chapter: 92. Punishment of forgoing Amr bil Maroof and Nahy Anil Munkar
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَرَفَهَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ الرِّضَا ع یَقُولُ إِذَا تَرَکَ امْرُؤٌ الْأَمْرَ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ وَ النَّهْیَ عَنِ الْمُنْکَرِ فَلْیَأْذَنْ
hadiths.en: 1.  Imam Ridha narrates that the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) said, “When my community stops enjoining good and restraining from evil, it should be prepared to wage war against Allah, hallowed be His name.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 92, H. 1002
reference.chapter: Punishment of forgoing Amr bil Maroof and Nahy Anil Munkar
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of forgoing Amr bil Maroof and Nahy Anil Munkar
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٩٢، ح ١٠٠٢

hadiths.chapter: 93. Punishment of Allah’s Anger
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْعَبَّاسِ بْنِ مَعْرُوفٍ عَنْ رَجُلٍ عَنْ مَنْدَلِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ الْعَبْرِیِّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُطَرِّفٍ عَنْ مِسْمَعٍ عَنِ الْأَصْبَغِ بْنِ نُبَاتَهَ عَنْ عَلِیٍّ ع قَالَ: إِذَا غَضِبَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَلَی بَلْدَهٍ وَ لَمْ یُنْزِلْ بِهَا الْعَذَابَ غَلَتْ أَسْعَارُهَا وَ قَصُرَتْ أَعْمَارُهَا وَ لَمْ تَرْبَحْ تُجَّارُهَا وَ لَمْ تَنْزِلْ أَثْمَارُهَا وَ لَمْ تَجْرِ أَنْهَارُهَا وَ حُبِسَ أَمْطَارُهَا وَ سُلِّطَ عَلَیْهَا أَشْرَارُهَا.
hadiths.en: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Muhammad from al-Abbas b. Ma’ruf from a man from Mandal b. Ali al-’Abri from Muhammad b. Matraf from Masma’ from al-Asbagh b. Nabateh from Ali (a.s.) who said: “If Allah gets angry over a city but does not reveal His chastisement upon it, it faces inflation, lifespan of people is reduced, trade becomes profitless, there is shortage of fruits, rivers become dry, rainfall becomes scanty and mischief-mongers are made to overpower them.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 93, H. 1003
reference.chapter: Punishment of Allah’s Anger
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of Allah’s Anger
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٩٣، ح ١٠٠٣

hadiths.chapter: 94. Punishment of killing a person after providing him shelter
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِیمَ بْنِ هَاشِمٍ عَنْ یَحْیَی بْنِ عِمْرَانَ عَنْ یُوسُفَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سُلَیْمَانَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع یَقُولُ مَنْ آمَنَ رَجُلًا عَلَی دَمِهِ ثُمَّ قَتَلَهُ جَاءَ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ یَحْمِلُ لِوَاءَ غَدْرِهِ.
hadiths.en: 1.  It is narrated that Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.) said, “If someone gives refuge to a person and then kills him, he will come on the Day of Judgment holding a banner of fraud.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 94, H. 1004
reference.chapter: Punishment of killing a person after providing him shelter
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of killing a person after providing him shelter
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٩٤، ح ١٠٠٤

hadiths.chapter: 95. Punishment of back-biting a warrior, hurting him and torturing his children
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِیمَ بْنِ هَاشِمٍ عَنِ النَّوْفَلِیِّ عَنِ السَّکُونِیِّ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنِ اغْتَابَ مُؤْمِناً غَازِیاً وَ آذَاهُ أَوْ خَلَفَهُ فِی أَهْلِهِ بِسُوءٍ نُصِبَ لَهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ وَ یَسْتَغْرِقُ حَسَنَاتِهِ ثُمَّ یُرْکَسُ فِی النَّارِ رَکْساً إِذَا کَانَ الْغَازِی فِی طَاعَهِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ.
hadiths.en: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) narrates from his ancestors that the  Holy  Prophet  (s.a.w.s.)  said,  “One  who  backbites  a believing warrior or hurts him or his family members, this deed will be stored at a place which will destroy all of his good deeds and he will be thrown headlong into Hell if the warrior was obedient to Allah.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 95, H. 1005
reference.chapter: Punishment of back-biting a warrior, hurting him and torturing his children
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of back-biting a warrior, hurting him and torturing his children
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٩٥، ح ١٠٠٥

hadiths.chapter: 96. Punishment of threatening a believer with a king
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی أَحْمَدُ بْنُ إِدْرِیسَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِیمَ بْنِ هَاشِمٍ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ الْخَفَّافِ عَنْ بَعْضِ الْکُوفِیِّینَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ رَوَّعَ مُؤْمِناً بِسُلْطَانٍ لِیُصِیبَهُ مِنْهُ مَکْرُوهاً فَلَمْ یصابه [یصیبه [یُصِبْهُ]] فَهُوَ فِی النَّارِ وَ مَنْ رَوَّعَ بِسُلْطَانٍ لِیُصِیبَهُ مِنْهُ مَکْرُوهاً فَأَصَابَهُ فَهُوَ مَعَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَ إِنَّ فِرْعَوْنَ فِی النَّارِ.
hadiths.en: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Ahmad b. Idris from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ibrahim b. Hashim from Ishaq al-Khafaf from some of the Kufans from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who threatens a believer by saying that the latter will be harmed by the king. If the believer is not harmed, the person will go to Hell and if the believer is harmed, the person will be sent to Hell along with Firon and his progeny.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 96, H. 1006
reference.chapter: Punishment of threatening a believer with a king
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of threatening a believer with a king
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٩٦، ح ١٠٠٦

hadiths.chapter: 97. Punishment of hurting a believer or having enmity with him
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی الْعَطَّارُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ مُوسَی بْنِ عُمَرَ عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنِ الْمُفَضَّلِ بْنِ عُمَرَ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع إِذَا کَانَ یَوْمُ الْقِیَامَهِ نَادَی مُنَادٍ أَیْنَ الصُّدُودُ لِأَوْلِیَائِی فَیَقُومُ قَوْمٌ لَیْسَ عَلَی وُجُوهِهِمْ لَحْمٌ قَالَ فَیُقَالُ هَؤُلَاءِ الَّذِینَ آذَوُا الْمُؤْمِنِینَ وَ نَصَبُوا لَهُمْ وَ عَانَدُوهُمْ وَ عَنَّفُوهُمْ فِی دِینِهِمْ قَالَ ثُمَّ یُؤْمَرُ بِهِمْ إِلَی جَهَنَّمَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع کَانُوا وَ اللَّهِ لَا یَقُولُونَ بِقَوْلِهِمْ وَ لَکِنَّهُمْ حَبَسُوا حُقُوقَهُمْ وَ أَذَاعُوا عَلَیْهِمْ سِرَّهُمْ.
hadiths.en: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) relates that a caller will call out on the  Day  of  Judgment,  “Where  are  those  who  had  enmity with my  lovers?”  Some people  will stand up whose  faces will  have  no  flesh.  The  caller  will,  say,  “These  are  the people  who  used  to  hurt  believers  and  had  enmity  with them. They used to disgrace the believers because of their religion.” Those people will be ordered to be taken to Hell.” Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “I swear by Allah! These are the people who used to agree with the words of believers but used to trespass their rights. They used to expose the secrets of believers.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 97, H. 1007
reference.chapter: Punishment of hurting a believer or having enmity with him
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of hurting a believer or having enmity with him
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٩٧، ح ١٠٠٧

hadiths.chapter: 98. Punishment of Innovation
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ یَعْقُوبَ بْنِ یَزِیدَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی عُمَیْرٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ الْحَکَمِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: کَانَ رَجُلٌ فِی الزَّمَنِ الْأَوَّلِ طَلَبَ الدُّنْیَا مِنْ حَلَالٍ فَلَمْ یَقْدِرْ عَلَیْهَا فَطَلَبَهَا مِنْ حَرَامٍ فَلَمْ یَقْدِرْ عَلَیْهَا فَأَتَاهُ الشَّیْطَانُ فَقَالَ یَا هَذَا إِنَّکَ قَدْ طَلَبْتَ الدُّنْیَا مِنْ حَلَالٍ فَلَمْ تَقْدِرْ عَلَیْهَا وَ طَلَبْتَهَا مِنْ حَرَامٍ فَلَمْ تَقْدِرْ عَلَیْهَا أَ فَلَا أَدُلُّکَ عَلَی شَیْ ءٍ یَکْثُرُ بِهِ مَالُکَ وَ دُنْیَاکَ وَ تَکْثُرُ بِهِ تَبِعَتُکَ قَالَ بَلَی قَالَ تَبْتَدِعُ دِیناً وَ تَدْعُو إِلَیْهِ النَّاسَ فَفَعَلَ فَاسْتَجَابَ لَهُ النَّاسُ وَ أَطَاعُوهُ وَ أَصَابَ مِنَ الدُّنْیَا ثُمَّ إِنَّهُ فَکَّرَ فَقَالَ بِئْسَ مَا صَنَعْتُ ابْتَدَعْتُ دِیناً وَ دَعَوْتُ النَّاسَ إِلَیْهِ وَ مَا أَرَی لِی تَوْبَهً إِلَّا أَنْ آتِیَ مَنْ دَعَوْتُهُ إِلَیْهِ فَأَرُدَّهُ عَنْهُ فَجَعَلَ یَأْتِی أَصْحَابَهُ الَّذِینَ أَجَابُوهُ فَیَقُولُ إِنَّ الَّذِی دَعَوْتُکُمْ إِلَیْهِ بَاطِلٌ وَ إِنَّمَا ابْتَدَعْتُهُ فَجَعَلُوا یَقُولُونَ کَذَبْتَ هَذَا هُوَ الْحَقُّ وَ لَکِنَّکَ شَکَکْتَ فِی دِینِکَ فَرَجَعْتَ عَنْهُ فَلَمَّا رَأَی ذَلِکَ عَمَدَ إِلَی سِلْسِلَهٍ فَوَتَدَ لَهَا وَتِداً ثُمَّ جَعَلَهَا فِی عُنُقِهِ وَ قَالَ لَا أَحُلُّهَا حَتَّی یَتُوبَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَلَیَّ فَأَوْحَی اللَّهُ إِلَی نَبِیٍّ مِنَ الْأَنْبِیَاءِ قُلْ لِفُلَانٍ وَ عِزَّتِی لَوْ دَعَوْتَنِی حَتَّی یَنْقَطِعَ أَوْصَالُکَ مَا اسْتَجَبْتُ لَکَ حَتَّی تَرُدَّ مَنْ مَاتَ مِمَّا دَعَوْتَهُ إِلَیْهِ فَرَجَعَ عَنْهُ.
hadiths.en: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ya’qub b. Yazid from Muhammad b. Abi ’Umayr from Hisham b. al-Hakam from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “I will remain in this condition till Allah forgives me.” The Almighty Allah sent one of His prophets to him and conveyed the message that He swears by His honor that He is not going to forgive that person even if he repents so much that the joints of his body are separated. If the person wants to be forgiven, he should bring back to life those people who died on his religion.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 98, H. 1008
reference.chapter: Punishment of Innovation
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of Innovation
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٩٨، ح ١٠٠٨

hadiths.chapter: 98. Punishment of Innovation
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ یَعْقُوبَ بْنِ یَزِیدَ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عِیسَی عَنْ حَرِیزٍ یَرْفَعُهُ قَالَ: کُلُّ بِدْعَهٍ ضَلَالَهٌ وَ کُلُّ ضَلَالَهٍ سَبِیلُهَا النَّارُ.
hadiths.en: 2. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ya’qub b. Yazid from Hamad b. Isa from Hareez who raised it to who said: An infallible Imam says that every innovation is misguidance and every misguidance leads to Hell.

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 98, H. 1009
reference.chapter: Punishment of Innovation
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of Innovation
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٩٨، ح ١٠٠٩

hadiths.chapter: 98. Punishment of Innovation
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِی خَالِدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: أَدْنَی الشِّرْکِ أَنْ یَبْتَدِعَ الرَّجُلُ رَأْیاً فَیُحِبَّ عَلَیْهِ وَ یُبْغِضَ.
hadiths.en: 3. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from his father from Muhammad b. Sinan from Abi Khalid from Muhammad b. Muslim from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: “The lowest form of polytheism is to invent a new religion and hate and love according to it.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 98, H. 1010
reference.chapter: Punishment of Innovation
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of Innovation
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٩٨، ح ١٠١٠

hadiths.chapter: 98. Punishment of Innovation
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَی بْنِ الْمُتَوَکِّلِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْحِمْیَرِیُّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْخَطَّابِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِی حَمْزَهَ الثُّمَالِیِّ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع مَا أَدْنَی النَّصْبِ فَقَالَ أَنْ یَبْتَدِعَ الرَّجُلُ شَیْئاً فَیُحِبَّ عَلَیْهِ وَ یُبْغِضَ عَلَیْهِ.
hadiths.en: 4. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Musa b. al-Mutawakil who said it was narrated to me by Abdillah b. Ja’far al-Himyari from Muhammad b. al-Hussain b. Abi al-Khattab from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Abdillah b. Sinan from Abi Hamzah al-Thumali who said: Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.) was asked, “What is the lowest form of idol-worship?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “Creating a new religion and loving and hating people on the basis of it.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 98, H. 1011
reference.chapter: Punishment of Innovation
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of Innovation
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٩٨، ح ١٠١١

hadiths.chapter: 98. Punishment of Innovation
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارِ عَنْ یَعْقُوبَ بْنِ یَزِیدَ عَنِ الْعَمِّیِّ بِإِسْنَادِهِ قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص أَبَی اللَّهُ تَعَالَی لِصَاحِبِ الْبِدْعَهِ بِالتَّوْبَهِ قِیلَ یَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ وَ کَیْفَ ذَلِکَ قَالَ إِنَّهُ قَدْ أُشْرِبَ قَلْبُهُ حُبَّهَا.
hadiths.en: 5. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan from Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ya’qub b. Yazid from al-’Ama by his chain who said: “The Almighty Allah will not accept the repentance of a person who starts an innovation.” He was asked, “Why is it so?” He replied, “It is because the person has kept the love of innovation in his heart.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 98, H. 1012
reference.chapter: Punishment of Innovation
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of Innovation
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٩٨، ح ١٠١٢

hadiths.chapter: 98. Punishment of Innovation
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ هَارُونَ بْنِ الْجَهْمِ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ عُمَرَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ مَشَی إِلَی صَاحِبِ بِدْعَهٍ فَوَقَّرَهُ فَقَدْ مَشَی فِی هَدْمِ الْإِسْلَامِ.
hadiths.en: 6. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from his father from Harun b. al-Jahm from Ja’far b. Umar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “A person who takes a single step towards a person who does innovation and respects him is certainly like a person who has taken a step to destroy Islam.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 98, H. 1013
reference.chapter: Punishment of Innovation
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of Innovation
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٩٨، ح ١٠١٣

hadiths.chapter: 99. Punishment of disobeying Allah
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی أَحْمَدُ بْنُ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنْ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عِیسَی عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِهِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَا خَلَقَ اللَّهُ خَلْقاً إِلَّا جَعَلَ لَهُ فِی الْجَنَّهِ مَنْزِلًا وَ فِی النَّارِ مَنْزِلًا فَإِذَا أُسْکِنَ أَهْلُ الْجَنَّهِ الْجَنَّهَ وَ أَهْلُ النَّارِ النَّارَ نَادَی مُنَادٍ یَا أَهْلَ الْجَنَّهِ أَشْرِفُوا فَیُشْرِفُونَ عَلَی النَّارِ وَ یُرْفَعُ لَهُمْ مَنَازِلُهُمْ فِی النَّارِ ثُمَّ یُقَالُ لَهُمْ هَذِهِ مَنَازِلُکُمُ الَّتِی لَوْ عَصَیْتُمْ رَبَّکُمْ دَخَلْتُمُوهَا فَلَوْ أَنَّ أَحَداً مَاتَ فَرَحاً لَمَاتَ أَهْلُ الْجَنَّهِ ذَلِکَ الْیَوْمَ فَرَحاً بِمَا صُرِفَ عَنْهُمْ مِنَ الْعَذَابِ ثُمَّ یُنَادَوْنَ یَا مَعَاشِرَ أَهْلِ النَّارِ ارْفَعُوا رُءُوسَکُمْ فَانْظُرُوا إِلَی مَنَازِلِکُمْ فِی الْجَنَّهِ فَیَرْفَعُونَ رُءُوسَهُمْ فَیَنْظُرُونَ إِلَی مَنَازِلِهِمْ وَ مَا فِیهَا مِنَ النَّعِیمِ فَیُقَالُ لَهُمْ هَذِهِ مَنَازِلُکُمُ الَّتِی لَوْ أَطَعْتُمْ رَبَّکُمْ دَخَلْتُمُوهَا قَالَ قَالَ فَلَوْ أَنَّ أَحَداً مَاتَ حُزْناً لَمَاتَ أَهْلُ النَّارِ ذَلِکَ [الْیَوْمَ حُزْناً] أهل النار فَیُورَثُ هَؤُلَاءِ مَنَازِلَ هَؤُلَاءِ وَ هَؤُلَاءِ مَنَازِلَ هَؤُلَاءِ وَ ذَلِکَ قَوْلُ اللَّهِ تَعَالَی أُولئِکَ هُمُ الْوارِثُونَ. الَّذِینَ یَرِثُونَ الْفِرْدَوْسَ هُمْ فِیها خالِدُونَ
hadiths.en: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah who said it was narrated to me by Ahmad b. al-Hussain b. Sa’eed from Uthman b. Isa from some of his companions from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: These are they who are the heirs. Who shall inherit the Paradise; they shall abide therein.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 99, H. 1014
reference.chapter: Punishment of disobeying Allah
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of disobeying Allah
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٩٩، ح ١٠١٤

hadiths.chapter: 100. Punishment of doubt and sin
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ بَکْرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْأَزْدِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ قَالَ أَمِیرُ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ ع إِنَّ الشَّکَّ وَ الْمَعْصِیَهَ فِی النَّارِ لَیْسَ مِنَّا وَ لَا إِلَیْنَا.
hadiths.en: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) narrates that Amirul Momineen (a.s.) said, “There is no relation of doubt and sin with us and the way of doubt and sin does not reach us in any way.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 100, H. 1015
reference.chapter: Punishment of doubt and sin
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of doubt and sin
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٠٠، ح ١٠١٥

hadiths.chapter: 101. Punishment of a woman who applies perfume for anyone except her husband and goes out without his permission
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ یَعْقُوبَ بْنِ یَزِیدَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی عُمَیْرٍ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِیمَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْحَمِیدِ عَنِ الْوَلِیدِ بْنِ صَبِیحٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص أَیُّ امْرَأَهٍ تَتَطَیَّبُ ثُمَّ خَرَجَتْ مِنْ بَیْتِهَا فَهِیَ تُلْعَنُ حَتَّی تَرْجِعَ إِلَی بَیْتِهَا مَتَی رَجَعَتْ.
hadiths.en: 1.  Imam  Ja’far  Sadiq  (a.s.)  narrates  that  the  Holy  Prophet (s.a.w.s.) said, “If a woman goes out after applying perfume, she will be cursed till the time she returns.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 101, H. 1016
reference.chapter: Punishment of a woman who applies perfume for anyone except her husband and goes out without his permission
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of a woman who applies perfume for anyone except her husband and goes out without his permission
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٠١، ح ١٠١٦

hadiths.chapter: 102. Punishment of not helping Ahle Bayt (a.s.) in spite of seeing and hearing them calling for help
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی الْحُسَیْنُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی أَبِی عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِیلَ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ الْحَکَمِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی الْجَارُودِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ قَیْسٍ الْمَشْرِقِیِّ قَالَ: دَخَلْتُ عَلَی الْحُسَیْنِ ع أَنَا وَ ابْنُ عَمٍّ لِی وَ هُوَ فِی قَصْرِ بَنِی مُقَاتِلٍ فَسَلَّمْنَا عَلَیْهِ فَقَالَ لَهُ ابْنُ عَمِّی یَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ هَذَا الَّذِی أَرَی خِضَابٌ أَوْ شَعْرُکَ فَقَالَ خِضَابٌ وَ الشَّیْبُ إِلَیْنَا بَنِی هَاشِمٍ یُعَجِّلُ ثُمَّ أَقْبَلَ عَلَیْنَا فَقَالَ جِئْتُمَا لِنُصْرَتِی فَقُلْتُ إِنِّی رَجُلٌ کَبِیرُ السِّنِّ کَثِیرُ الدَّیْنِ کَثِیرُ الْعِیَالِ وَ فِی یَدِی بَضَائِعُ لِلنَّاسِ وَ لَا أَدْرِی مَا یَکُونُ وَ أَکْرَهُ أَنْ أُضَیِّعَ أَمَانَتِی وَ قَالَ لَهُ ابْنُ عَمِّی مِثْلَ ذَلِکَ قَالَ لَنَا فَانْطَلِقَا فَلَا تَسْمَعَا لِی وَاعِیَهً وَ لَا تَرَیَا لِی سَوَاداً فَإِنَّهُ مَنْ سَمِعَ وَاعِیَتَنَا أَوْ رَأَی سَوَادَنَا فَلَمْ یُجِبْنَا وَ لَمْ یُعِنَّا کَانَ حَقّاً عَلَی اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَنْ یُکِبَّهُ عَلَی مَنْخِرَیْهِ فِی النَّارِ.
hadiths.en: 1. It was narrated to me by al-Hussain b. Ahmad who said it was narrated to me by Abi from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Muhammad b. Ismail from Ali b. al-Hakam from his father from Abi al-Jarud from ’Amru b. Qays al-Mashraqi who said: “I can see dye applied on your hair. Are your hairs turning white?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “Yes it is the dye which I have applied. We, the Hashemites turn old soon.” Then Imam glanced at the narrator and asked, “Have you come for my help?” The narrator replied, “I have become aged and turned old. I have huge loans on my head and I have a large family. I am also having the things of other people with me kept as trust. I don’t know what will happen to me if I go with you? I don’t want to deprive so many people of their trust.” The cousin also gave similar excuses for not accompanying the Imam (a.s.). Upon this, Imam (a.s.) told them, “Go away from this place as if you have not heard me asking for help because one who hears an Imam asking for help and turns a deaf ear, will be thrown headlong into Hell.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 102, H. 1017
reference.chapter: Punishment of not helping Ahle Bayt (a.s.) in spite of seeing and hearing them calling for help
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of not helping Ahle Bayt (a.s.) in spite of seeing and hearing them calling for help
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٠٢، ح ١٠١٧

hadiths.chapter: 103. Punishment of taking up the leadership of ten persons and not being able to do justice to them
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ عَلِیِّ بْنِ أَبِی الْخَطَّابِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ جَبَلَهَ عَنْ أَبِی طَالِبٍ عَنِ ابْنِ هَدِیَّهَ عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِکٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ص یَقُولُ مَنْ وَلِیَ عَشَرَهً فَلَمْ یَعْدِلْ فِیهِمْ جَاءَ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ وَ یَدَاهُ وَ رِجْلَاهُ وَ رَأْسُهُ فِی ثَقْبِ فَأْسٍ.
hadiths.en: 1.  It is narrated that the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) said, “One who takes up the leadership of ten persons and is not able to do justice to them, will come on the Day of Judgment with his hands, feet and head perforated.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 103, H. 1018
reference.chapter: Punishment of taking up the leadership of ten persons and not being able to do justice to them
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of taking up the leadership of ten persons and not being able to do justice to them
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٠٣، ح ١٠١٨

hadiths.chapter: 104. Punishment of taking the command of Muslims and wasting it
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَسَّانَ عَنْ أَبِی عِمْرَانَ الْأَرْمَنِیِّ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الْحَکَمِ عَنْ مُعَاوِیَهَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ مَرْوَانَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ وَلِیَ شَیْئاً مِنْ أُمُورِ الْمُسْلِمِینَ فَضَیَّعَهُمْ ضَیَّعَهُ اللَّهُ تَعَالَی.
hadiths.en: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ahmad from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Abi ’Imran al-Armani from Abdillah b. al-Hakam from Muawiyah b. Ammar from ’Amru b. Marwan from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Allah will destroy one who takes the command of Muslims and destroys it.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 104, H. 1019
reference.chapter: Punishment of taking the command of Muslims and wasting it
reference.location: Punishments › Punishment of taking the command of Muslims and wasting it
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٠٤، ح ١٠١٩

hadiths.chapter: 105. Punishment of oppressors and their helpers
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنِ الْعَبَّاسِ بْنِ مَعْرُوفٍ عَنْ أَبِی الْمُغِیرَهِ عَنِ السَّکُونِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص إِذَا کَانَ یَوْمُ الْقِیَامَهِ نَادَی مُنَادٍ أَیْنَ الظَّلَمَهُ وَ أَعْوَانُهُمْ وَ مَنْ لاط [لَاقَ] لَهُمْ دَوَاهً وَ رَبَطَ کِیساً أَوْ مَدَّ لَهُمْ مره [مَدَّهَ] قَلَمٍ فَاحْشُرُوهُمْ مَعَهُمْ.
hadiths.en: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) narrates from his ancestors that the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) said that a caller will call out on the  Day  of  Judgment,  “Where  are  oppressors  and  their helpers? Those who bring ink for them, who prepare bags for  them  and  those  who  hold  the  pen  for  them;  all  are included among their helpers.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 105, H. 1020
